content.content:
<gap:target id="celery-worker-service-block">
    <gap:target id="celery-worker-service-name">celery-worker</gap:target>:
    <gap:target id="celery-worker-service-image">image: notification-service</gap:target>
    <gap:target id="celery-worker-service-command">command: celery -A app.celery worker --loglevel=info</gap:target>
    <gap:target id="celery-worker-service-env-file">env_file:
      - <gap:target id="celery-worker-env-file-path">./notification-service/.env</gap:target></gap:target>
    <gap:target id="celery-worker-service-networks">networks:
      - <gap:target id="shared-network-name-11">app-network</gap:target></gap:target>
  </gap:target>
